creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244451
Minor adjustments to COMMENT and WWW in Makefile's and added description to pkg-descr of x11-wm/ittywm and/or x11/jbxvt

For x11-wm/ittywm, added minor detail to COMMENT and pkg-descr in Makefile.

For x11/jbxvt updated WWW in Makefile. Old URL still works, because it redirects to current location. Added minor detail to COMMENT.

Summary of ittywm changes to Makefile and pkg-descr
-COMMENT=       Ridiculously tiny libxcb window manager
+COMMENT=       Ridiculously tiny libxcb window manager based on tinywm

-ittywm is a windowmanager in xcb which is based off of tinywm.
+ittywm is a window manager in xcb which is based off of tinywm. It is lighter on
+resources than its predecessor.


Summary of jbxvt Makefile
-COMMENT=       XVT fork in xcb
-WWW=           https://github.com/jefbed/jbxvt
+COMMENT=       XVT terminal emulator fork in libxcb
+WWW=           https://github.com/alisabedard/jbxvt

Thank you
